note: Created ScrapedDuckEventParser service and 41 xUnit tests covering: event type normalisation (32→11 mapping + unknown→Other), timestamp parsing (local/UTC Z-suffix/null/no-milliseconds), Community Day buff extraction (multiplier/duration/spawn/probability/trade/disclaimer), Spotlight Hour buff extraction (both API formats), Pokemon extraction (spawns/shinies/spotlight/raid bosses/research breakthrough), promo codes, generic flags, and full integration test.
